hero_subheadline: Feel Every Beat with Spotify: Music and Podcasts. Listen to songs, play podcasts, create playlists and discover music you'll love

benefits.title: Podcast Variety
benefits.description: Access to over 80 million songs and 4 million podcasts for free.

benefits.title: Smarter Playlists
benefits.description: Personalized playlists and recommendations that match your mood.

benefits.title: Offline Access
benefits.description: Seamless offline listening with Spotify Premium.

faq_items.question: How does Spotify Premium work?
faq_items.answer: The experience is designed around fast discovery, smooth listening, and personalized recommendations.

faq_items.question: What are the benefits of using Spotify?
faq_items.answer: The experience is designed around fast discovery, smooth listening, and personalized recommendations.

faq_items.question: Can I listen offline with Spotify?
faq_items.answer: You can install the app and use its supported features on your device immediately. Check in-app settings for offline options.
